title: Class Scenes
blurb: The two milestones from the course: implementing reflection, then affine transformations, on the simple scene shown in class.

cards.title: Reflection
cards.desc: The scene shown in class: a reflective sphere and two blocks.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 6 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 0.9 s

cards.title: Affine Transformation
cards.desc: The same scene, the sphere squashed into an ellipsoid by a 3x4 affine matrix.
cards.meta: 1024x1024  -  3x3 anti-aliasing (9 rays/pixel)  -  up to 6 reflections/refractions  -  rendered in 1.2 s
